title: Happy 80th Birthday Banner (2.7m x 13cm) • Blue Holographic Foil Party Decoration for Age 80 Celebrations • Glitter Pennant • Garland for Indoor & Outdoor Use
features: A BEAUTIFUL WAY TO CELEBRATE 80 YEARS – Honour eight incredible decades with this shimmering holographic foil banner from British Ballet. Measuring 2.7 meters in length and 13 cm in height, the repeating design can be split into 3 x 90cm sections. Perfect banner for birthday decoration inside or outside.

MAKE GRANDMA OR GRANDPA'S DAY TRULY SPECIAL – Whether you're hosting a cosy tea for grandma or a garden gathering for grandpa, this happy birthday banner for 80th birthdays adds heartfelt charm. Drape it across tables, walls, fences, doors or windows or use it as a lovely centrepiece to create lasting memories.

SPARKLING FOIL FOR A JOYFUL GLOW – Designed with holographic glitter foil, this banner reflects light beautifully, adding elegant sparkle to the 80th birthday atmosphere. Ideal for family photos and heartfelt celebrations.

REUSABLE & WEATHERPROOF – Made from tear-resistant, waterproof foil, this lightweight banner is durable and folds easily for future use. A thoughtful, long-lasting birthday sign for milestone occasions.

BRITISH BALLET – TRUSTED FAMILY BRAND – Since 2013, British Ballet has grown from a small family-run venture into one of the UK’s leading suppliers of party goods. Backed by over 40 years of combined experience, we create joyful, reliable decorations designed to make your celebrations truly memorable – always with heart and attention to detail.
